arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs Liverpool - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as the Reds look to advance with a perfect record plus updates from Girona vs Arsenal and Aston Villa vs Celtic
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores and updates as Liverpool look to progress with a perfect record, plus updates from Girona vs Arsenal and Aston Villa vs Celtic.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's finishing is 'on another level' - Slot and Lineker talk goals
arts.sum: Gary Lineker sits down with Liverpool manager Arne Slot to discuss his first season in England, similarities between Liverpool and Feyenoord and his expectations for the season.

arts.ttl: Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target
arts.sum: Napoli received bad news about Karim Adeyemi and aren’t making progress for Alejandro Garnacho, so they are turning their attention to other wingers like PSV’s Noa Lang. The Dutch team is resisting for now, while the player is open to the move. The post Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's finishing is 'on another level' - Slot and Lineker talk goals
arts.sum: Gary Lineker sits down with Liverpool manager Arne Slot to discuss his first season in England, similarities between Liverpool and Feyenoord and his expectations for the season.

arts.ttl: Why Have Liverpool Rested So Many Big Stars for PSV in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk, Alisson, Luis Diaz, Ryan Gravenberch and Trent Alexander-Arnold are among the names absent from Liverpool's squad vs. PSV in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: The eyewatering wage Steven Gerrard is giving up to leave Saudi as Liverpool icon sees Rangers return chat skyrocket
arts.sum: The title-winning Ibrox boss is set to ditch a megabucks pay packet to leave the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: PSV vs Liverpool LIVE - team news, TV channel, kick-off time, score and commentary stream
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Paul Wheelock, Ian Doyle, Theo Squires, Matt C Jones)
arts.sum: Live updates as Liverpool travel to PSV in the final game of the Champions League group phase

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'close the door on January move for Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold' after two failed bids
arts.sum: Madrid's interest in the 26-year-old is no secret and he could still end up at the Bernabeu. If he does not sign a new contract then he will be able to leave for free after his current deal expires on June 30.

arts.ttl: How to watch PSV Eindhoven vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Liverpool continue their Champions League charge with a match against PSV Eindhoven at the Philips Stadion.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool are 'definitely' working on SUMMER signings - and reveals why the club has been largely inactive in the transfer market since his arrival
arts.sum: The Dutchman's tenure thus far has exceeded the expectations of even the most optimistic Reds supporter. Slot had the unenviable task of following club legend Jurgen Klopp.
